member.name: T:ReqnrollConnector.Discovery.DefaultBindingProvider
member.summary: The default discovery command that should work for all Reqnroll versions. Once the discovery interface of Reqnroll changes, another implementation can be created.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.Discovery.DefaultBindingProvider.GetBindingsJson(ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.ITestAssemblyContext,System.String)
member.summary: Calls the BindingProviderService.DiscoverBindings via reflection to get the bindings json. The result is a serialized json string representing the discovered bindings represented by the class.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.Discovery.DefaultBindingProvider.DeserializeBindingData(System.String,ReqnrollConnector.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Deserializes the bindings json into the object. Currently, the class structure is compatible with the binding data returned by any Reqnroll version, therefore we can directly deserialize the returned JSON to . Later, we might need to implement version-specific deserialization logic here.

member.name: T:ReqnrollConnector.Discovery.DiscoveryResultTransformer
member.summary: Transforms discovery results from class to .
